description: Allowlist of ingestion sources mapped to canonical source_id. Use callups.source_id or matches.source_id; weights apply conservatively via min(weight) per team.

tier_definitions.A: Primary authority — FIFA, federations, or official competition match reports.
tier_definitions.B: Strong secondary — licensed data feeds, broadly used aggregation with editorial standards, match-day feeds.
tier_definitions.C: Broad coverage / community — wiki-style or independent round-ups; validate against Tier A/B when possible.

sources.name: FIFA tournament hub & published squad disclosures
ingestion_notes: Use when federations lodge preliminary or final lists as published by FIFA.

sources.name: National FA / federation press releases and PDF squad lists
ingestion_notes: Prefer the canonical spelling from the federation document.

sources.name: Confederation-official competition match centres (lineups/benches)
ingestion_notes: Strong evidence that a player was selected for that match window.
Map each row to matches.competition_type and stage.

sources.name: Licensed football data APIs (e.g. industry feed providers)
ingestion_notes: Requires contract/Terms acceptance; preferable for repeatable builds.

sources.name: Transfermarkt national team / call-up oriented pages
ingestion_notes: Good breadth; normalize names toward federation spelling before linking players.

sources.name: Public match-day lineup apps / sites (generic bucket — SofaScore, FotMob, etc.)
ingestion_notes: Use official ToS-compliant access; corroborate against FA where stakes are high.
Sofascore URL is representative — swap access_mode when using another vendor under license.

sources.name: Major wire or broadcaster when reproducing a federation announcement
ingestion_notes: Treat as secondary to the federation primary; cite the FA URL in notes when known.

sources.name: WorldCupWiki — World Cup 2026 squads hub page
ingestion_notes: Useful breadth; incomplete for some nations; confirm ToS/automation constraints.
Cross-check provisional vs final statuses before presenting as authoritative.

sources.name: Wikipedia — 2026 FIFA World Cup squads (or predecessor navbox pages)
ingestion_notes: Extract only sourced rows; migrate with low confidence_weight and manual QA.

sources.name: Crowdsourced / forum spreadsheets (explicitly flagged)
ingestion_notes: Last resort filler; isolate in review queue — never lone evidence for contentious names.
